x4freetext: setup on the basis of ING-27 neutron generator.
Deuterons of ~100 keV on tritium target.
Powder of natural Cr(2)O(3) in an Al (0.2 mm walls
thickness) container of 14 cm height, 4-8 cm length and
detection of 3.5 MeV alphas from d+t -> n+alpha
. All detectors were calibrated by reference gamma
Entry was sent 07-05-2025 to Yu.Kopach for approval,
